resources.string: Ba za a iya shiga fiye da %d harrufa.
Manhajar da aka shigar zasu bayyana a nan.
Kasawar buɗe %s yayin da aka ba da damar yanayi mai Sauƙi.
Ba za a iya amfani da Gaming Hub a yanayin lafiya ba.
"An kasa ƙara ma'ajiyar shafin intanet. Da ma kana da wannan ma'ajiyar ɗauke da wannan suna da manhaja."
"%s a ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet an kasasu kamar wasanni kuma ya motsa zuwa wasanni Na."
Ba za a iya shiga fiye da %d harrufa.
"An kasa ƙara ma'ajiyar shafi. Akwai matsa ga hoton."
Ana amfani da shi don adana hotuna
"Don amfani da Ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet, kana buƙatar bada izini masu biyowa a saituna."

"Shafin intanet na ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet, hotunan da aka ajiye, ko manhajar da kake yawan amfani dasu yayin wasa. Zaka iya ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet dinsu anan ko ta danna %s a manhajar ajiye hotuna ko Samsung intanet, sai danna ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet na Gaming Hub."

"Shafin intanet na ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet, hotuna da aka adana, ko manhajar wanda kake amfani dashi yayin wasa. Za ku iya ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet dinsu a nan ko ta danna maɓalli na rabawa a manhajar ajiye hotuna ko Samsung Intanet, sai danna ma'ajiyar shafukan intanet na Gaming Hub."
"An kasa ƙara ma'ajiyar shafin intanet. Da ma kana da wannan ma'ajiyar ɗauke da wannan suna da adireshi."
Gano wasarka ta gaba da ka fi so.
Instant Plays ɗinku zai bayyana a nan.
Instant Plays da ku buga ko duba a kwanaki 30 na karshe zai bayyana a nan. Wannan ya haɗa da wasanni da kuka samo ta danna maɓalli na gaba.
Mafi tsayin zama ɗaya a kowane wasa
Lokacin da aka fi so a rana
Bayanin da aka nuna na watanni 12 da suka wuce.
Kun taka kasa a wannan makon fiye da na makon da ya gabata. Duba cikakken tarihin wasan ku.
Kun taka sama a wannan makon fiye da na makon da ya gabata. Duba cikakken tarihin wasan ku.
"Ana nuna ma'auni waɗanda aka ƙara a cikin Gaming Hub 8.0 daga ranar da aka shigar da sigar."
Yi wasanni don ƙara zuwa tarihin ka
Babu wasannin da aka buga kwanan nan
Wasan da akayi mafi yawa a rana ɗaya
Yin amfani da datar waya don kallon bidiyoyi zai kawo ƙarin caje-canje.
Wasannin intanet na yau da kullum
Har yanzu ba ka buga wannan wasan ba.
Buga wasan don ganin babban makinka a nan.
Samu maki %d don zuwa kashin bisa ɗari na gaba.
Wani abu ya tafi ba daidai ba. Ka sake gwadawa anjima.
Bayanan wasan ku na wannan wayar ne kawai.
Bayanan wasan ku na wannan tabulet ne kawai.
Bidiyon YouTube da aka ba da shawara
Ba wani abokinka da yake kan layi
Abu da aka ajiye a wurin %d.
Abu a wurin %d ba za ku iya ja ba.
Wani ya riga da ya fara amfani da laƙabin. Sake gwada wani.
An kasa amfani da wannan laƙabi. Sake gwada wani.
Don rikodin lokacin buga wasanka yadda ya dace, akwai buƙatar ka ba da damar gano amfani a Saituna.
A ba da damar shiga datar da aka yi amfani da ita?
Don ci gaba, ba da dama wa Tsarin MuhallinIntanet na Android a cikin Saituna > Manhajoji.
Ba da daman Tsarin Duba Android
Kana buƙatar ba wa manhajar YouTube dama a cikin Saituna don kammala wannan aiwatarwa.
Danna nan don kunna sautin wasa
Danna nan don kunna sautin wasa
Danna nan don saka dukkan wasanninka wuri ɗaya don shiga da sauri, sannan ka samu bayanai a kan wasanni masu zafi da za ka iya dubawa.
Ba za a cire muryar wasannin Cloud ba.
An yi wa laƙabinka alamar cewa bai dace ba sannan an mai da shi sunanka da yake a Samsung account ɗin ku. Ba za ka iya saita wani sabin laƙabi a furofayil ɗinka na wasa ba.
Shiga ciki don ganin naka maki mafi yawa da wasu.
Gwada waɗannan shahararrun wasanni yanzu, ba tare da saukewa ba.
Play yanzu. Babu buƙata na saukewa.
Wannan wasannin an kididdige shi don masu amfani %d ko fiye.
Wannan wasannin yawo zai iya amfani da adadi babba na data na waya.
Discover kuma jera manyan wasannin na waya, an tsara maka. Babu abubuwan da ake saukewa. Babu jira. Kawai danna kuma buga nan take.
Nutse cikin wasanni wanda aka fi so ɗinku da sauri tare da toolbar dake sa gudanarwa wasanni sauki da ajiye bi sawun komai da ku buga, harda Instant Plays.
Faɗaɗa gefen kayan gyara son ganin wasanninka na baya-baya, laburari na wasannin da aka sauke, da maɓallin kashewa.
Nutse cikin wasanni wanda aka fi so ɗinku da sauri tare da toolbar dake sa gudanarwa wasanni sauki da ajiye bi sawun komai da ku buga, harda Instant Plays.
Wasannin intanet na yau da kullum
Kunna nan take ba tare da saukewa ba.
Shafa hagu ko dama a toolbar don duba wasannin da aka buga kwanan nan.
Don nada lokacin buga wasanku daidai, kana buƙatar bada izinin bi sawun amfani.
Cigaba da bada izinin isa ga don amfani da data?
Girgiza wayarka ɗinka yayin amfani da Game Launcher don fara wasan zaɓin ɗan yatsa.
Girgiza tabulet ɗinka yayin amfani da Game Launcher don fara wasan zaɓin ɗan yatsa.
Waɗannan fasaloli ba su yi a hukumance, saboda haka sakamakonka zai iya bambanta.
An cire %1$s da %2$s daga Gaming Hub.
Ingancin Game Booster zai ci gaba har yanzu yayin buga wasa.
Za ka iya ci gaba da amfani da siffofin wasan Galaxy ba da wannan wasa bayan an cire ta.
Wani abu ya faru yayin da ake cire wannan wasa. A sake gwadawa daga baya.
Zaɓi wurin da sabbin wasanni za su fito a laburarenka.
"Ƙara ma'ajiyoyin shafi don ganin su a nan."
Ka samu furofayil na wasa kawai. Duba shi!
Barka da zuwa! Duba sabon furofayil ɗinka na wasa.
Kana so ka samu sanarwa game da garaɓasa da bayanin kasuwanci?
Ka yarda ku karɓi %1$s bayanan talla akan %2$s. Don canza wannan saitunan, je zuwa %3$s.
Duba haɗin hanyar sadarwan ka sannan ka sake gwadawa.
Buga ko shigar da wasu wasanni don ganin su a nan.
Za a kashe sautin wasa, amma muryar wayanku bazai canza ba. Cire shiru ta danna maɓalli na murya sama ko kasa yayin buga wasa.
Sautin wasanni za a kashe, amma muryar tabulet ɗinku bazai canza ba. Cire shiru ta danna maɓalli na murya sama ko kasa yayin buga wasa.
Ku shigarwa ciki don bi sawun aikin Instant Plays ɗinku.
Instant Plays da ku buga ko duba a kwanaki 30 na karshe zai bayyana a nan.
Wani abu ya faru yayin da ake ɗora bayanan wasa. A sake gwadawa daga baya.
Ƙara Gaming Hub zuwa Allon gida?
Bincika wasannin da aka ba ka shawara.
Duba duk wasannin da ka buga a cikin Wasanni na .
Ba ku shigar da kowane wasinni ba tukunna. Ku je Galaxy Store don duba wasu wasanni da kana iya so.
Danna sau biyu don buga wasa
Wasannin da kuke yi akai-akai za a nuna su anan.
Danna nan don canzawa zuwa duba na ɗakin karatu.
Ku buƙaci ƙayyade sarrafawan bayanan sirrin ku don wannan sabis din. Don cire wannan ƙayyade, ku je zuwa shafin intanet inda ku yi wannan buƙata.
Ku yarda ku samu gabatarwa Gaming Hub da labarai game da %s. Don canza wannan, je zuwa saituna > Samu gabatarwa da labarai game da wasanni.
Zamu sanar da kai game da rangwame, aukuwa na musamman, da sauransu.
Ku janye yarjejeniyarku na samun gabatarwa da labarai na Gaming Hub game da wasanni a %s. Don canza wannan, je zuwa saituna > Samu gabatarwa da labarai game da wasanni.
Kana son gabatarwa da labarai game da wasanni?
Ɓoye wasanni a sikirin na Gida da Manhaja?
%1$s ba zai yi aiki ba yayin da %2$s a %3$s an kashe. Za ku iya ba da dama a saituna.
Manhajoji da zai iya bayyana a sama
Haɗa Discord account ɗin ku don ganin wasannin da abokanka ke bugawa.
Kana so ka samu sanarwa game da garaɓasa da bayanin kasuwanci?
Ka yarda ku karɓi %1$s bayanan talla akan %2$s. Don canza wannan saitunan, je zuwa %3$s.
Duba haɗin netwok ɗinka sannan kuma sake gwadawa.
Koma zuwa ga kallo na cikakken sikirin don raba lokacin wasanka.
Sabbin wasanni nan take don ka duba su.
Kammala manufa don samun ƙwayaye. Ƙyanƙyashe ƙwayayen don haɗuwa da halittunka.
Yi shigarwa ciki don Instant Plays. Isa ga su daga toolbar.
Duba haɗin netwok ɗinka sannan kuma sake gwadawa.
Babu wani daga cikin manhajojin ku da zai iya yin wannan aikin.
Ba mu sami wata intanet ba.
Ba za a iya buɗe wannan wasanni ba don daina shigarwa.
Zaɓi wurin da kake son samun sanarwarka.
Don samun sanarwa daga %1$s, kunna damar shiga Sanarwa na %2$s a Saituna.
Zaɓi ko ku ga sanarwanku a Gaming Hub ko a panel din sanarwa.
Don amfani da fasalin, kana buƙatar ba da waɗannan izini a saituna.
Anyi amfani don sanarda kai batun aukuwa, shawarwari, da sauransu
Danna nan don saka dukkan wasanninka wuri ɗaya don shiga da sauri, sannan ka samu bayanai a kan wasanni masu zafi da za ka iya dubawa.
Kashe wasannin ka, ba sauran wayarku ba. Play a Gaming Hub don wannan da karin siffar yanayi mai sanyi.
Kashe wasannin ka, ba sauran tabulet ɗinku ba. Play a Gaming Hub don wannan da karin siffar yanayi mai sanyi.
Kalli bidiyoyin YouTube, duba waɗanne wasanni ne masu alfanu ga masu buga su, da ƙarin wasu.
Har yanzu zaka iya amfani da aikin asalin manhajar ba tare da barin izini na zabi ba.
Anyi amfani don sanarda kai batun aukuwa, shawarwari, da sauransu
Ana amfani don ƙara hotuna ga shafukanka da ka adana
"Ana amfani da ita domin rabawa da adana hotuna da adana Sharuɗɗa da Ƙa'idoji"
Izini masu zuwa ana buƙata don sabis ɗin manhaja. Don zaɓaɓɓun izini, tsohon ayyuka na sabis an kunna, amma ba a ba da dama ba.
Wasannin da za a nuna a tsarin lokacin wasanni
Shiga cikin don ganin naka tsarin lokaci.
Sangami ja ɗauke da tsinin mashi da ƙahoni
Mayya tana riƙe da tufa mai guba
Saƙago ruwan hoda a kan tayoyi
Fuskar babban yatsan hannu dake sa hula
Fuskar babban yatsan hannu tare da bandejin gashi
Fuskan babban yatsan hannu ga waƙa
Mayaƙi mai gemu da gatarin yaƙi
Ƙaton mutum mai tsokar hannu a cikin tufafi kore
Dodo kalan shunayya da wuta a bayansa
Matsafi mai gemu riƙe da sanda da ƙwallon wuta
Mugun mutum yana sanye da jan takunkumi da tufafi jajaye
Mace yar dambe sanye da dogon gashi
Ba za a iya soke wannan ba.
Don ganin tarihin wasan ka, ba da damar shiga bayanan amfanin ka a cikin Saituna.
Samu keɓaɓɓen alfanu da wayarka ta Galaxy.
Buɗe Gaming Hub don ci gaba.
An goge bayanan sirri na Gaming Hub
Ku nema a share bayanan sirrin ka. Siffar yanayin Gaming Hub da ke amfani da Samsung account ɗinku ba zai samu ba sai wancan tsarin ya cika.
Gaming Hub na buƙatar sake kunnawa.
Ku adana canje-canjen ku ko ku watsar da su?
Shafa sama ko kasa tare da yatsu biyu don gurgurawa.
Kunna bidiyo atomatik da datar waya
Sarrafa bayanai da rabawa don tallace-tallace dalilai
A Gaming Hub da allon gida da manhajoji
Za ka iya neman a goge bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinka a %1$shttps://privacy.samsung.com%2$s.
Duka bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku a wayarku kuma ajiye ta Samsung za a goge. Siffar yanayi na Gaming Hub da ke amfani da Samsung account ɗinku ba za a samu ba sai wancan tsari ya cika.
Duka bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku a tabulet ɗinku da ajiye ta Samsung za a goge. Siffofin Gaming Hub da ke amfani da Samsung account ɗinku ba za a samu ba sai tsari ya cika.
Goge bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku na dindindin?
Samu labarai da tayi na musamman
Kana iya gano keɓantacciyar tayi da sabbin siffofi daga %s da sauran manhajojin Samsung ta hanyar kunna Samun labarai da tayi na musamman a cikin saitunan Samsung account.
Idan kun kashe %1$s, za ku daina karɓar labarai da tayi ba kawai daga %2$s amma kuma daga sauran manhajojin Samsung da ayyuka.
Idan kana so ka daina samun labarai da tayi na musamman daga duk manhajojin Samsung, je zuwa %1$sSaituna > Samsung account > Tsaro da keɓantawa%2$s sai kuma a kashe %3$s.

Kula da cewa wasu manhajojin Samsung da sabis suna da nasu ikon sarrafa bayanan talla. Waɗancan abubuwan sarrafawa suna shafar tallan da aka aiko daga waɗannan manhajojin da sabis ɗinkuma basu da alaƙa da wannan saitin.
Ajiye wasan ku a cikin wasannin gajimarai
Za a shigar da wasannin gajimarai atomatik don ku ci gaba daga inda kuka tsaya.
Sabbin wasannin gajimare ba za a shigar da su atomatik ba. Wasan gajimare da aka riga aka sauke za a share su, kuma ba za a adana wasan gaba ba.
Kashe Ajiye na ku a cikin wasannin gajimarai?
An shigar da mafi sabuwar siga.
An shigar da mafi sabuwar siga.
Samu labarai da garaɓs ta musamman
A %1$s, ku janye yarjejeniyarku don samun gabatarwa da labarai game da wasanni daga %2$s.
A %1$s, ku yarda ku samu gabatarwa da labarai game da wasanni daga %2$s.
Shiga ciki don amfani da furofayil ɗinka na wasa, ka ga tarin halittun ka da ƙarin wasu.
Zaɓi wurin da kake son nuna wasanninka.
Wasanni da aka tuna a Gaming Hub da allon gida da manhajoji.
Don yin amfani da %s, danna Saituna, je ku zuwa bayanan Manhaja > Izini, sannan ku bada waɗannan izinin:
Sabon sigar %s ya fita. Sabunta don gwada sabbin fasaloli.
Shiga ciki zuwa ga Samsung account ɗinka ta amfani da Gaming Hub.
Za a goge bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku kuma ba za a iya dawo da su ba. Manhajojin wasan ku za su na samuwa a kan allon Manhajoji.
Fita da goge bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku?
Kuna iya shiga cikin Samsung accounts don buɗe Gaming Hub, rufe Gaming Hub a yanzu, ko barin Gaming Hub da goge bayanan Gaming Hub ɗinku.
Shiga ciki don ci gaba da amfani da Gaming Hub
Wani abu ya tafi ba daidai ba. Ka sake gwadawa anjima.
Za a goge dukan manhajar bayanai dindindin. Wannan ya ƙunshi fayiloli, saituna, asusu, bayanai da sauran su.
An ƙara wasanni kaitsaye saboda haka a koyaushe za ka iya samun wasan da kake son bugawa.
Duba abin da yake sabo a Wasannin Nan take
ID na mai asusu don talla
Yin amfani da datar waya don kallon bidiyoyi zai kawo ƙarin caje-canje.
Ka inganta kwarewar tallen ka da adontawa talle
Samu adontawa talle ta wurin amincewa da Samsung ya ƙarba ya kuma yi amfani da bayani na mutum (zaɓi)
Samu adontawa talle ta wurin raba bayani na mutum da abokan ciniki na Samsung (zaɓi)
Get personalized ads while you use this app.
Information about your phone and app, including your phone’s identifiers such as the IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
Information about your tablet and app, including your tablet’s identifiers such as the IP address and ad ID, will be used by Samsung’s business partners who may provide the personalized ads.
You can turn this off at any time in the app settings.
If you don’t agree, you’ll still receive the same number of ads, but they won’t be personalized.
For more information about how your data is processed, see the %1$sPrivacy Notice%2$s.
Ka inganta kwarewar tallen ka da adontawa talle
Duk lokacin da kuka shigar da sabon wasanni, za ku iya samunsa a cikin Gaming Hub.
Keɓance wasanninku, alamar shafin masu amfani na caca, sarrafa lokacin wasan ku, sami takaddun shaida na musamman, da ƙari mai yawa.
Nuna manhajojin wasanni a Gaming Hub kawai
Nuna manhajar wasanni a Gaming Hub kawai (na zaɓi)
Ku duba %1$sTsarin Sanarwar mu%2$s don ganni yadda muke kula da bayanai.
Don ci gaba, yarda da %1$sSanarwan Sirri%2$s.
"Idan kun ci gaba, kun amince da %1$sƘa'idojin Sanarwa%2$s."
Duba tamu %1$sSanarwar Sirri%2$s don ganin yadda muke sarrafa bayanan ku da bin Dokar Kariyar Keɓaɓɓun bayanai.
Ku duba %1$sTsarin Sanarwar mu%2$s don ganni yadda muke kula da bayanai.
Duba tamu %1$sSanarwar Sirri%2$s don ganin yadda muke sarrafa bayanan ku da bin Dokar Kariyar Keɓaɓɓun bayanai.
Don ci gaba, ku yarda da sabuntawar mu %1$sSanarwan Sirri%2$s.
Duba sabunta mu %1$sSanarwan Sirri%2$s don ganin yanda muke sarrafa bayananku.
"Ta ci gaba, za ku iya yarda da sabunta %1$sSharuɗɗa da Ka'idoji%2$s."
"Ta ci gaba, za ku yarda da sabunta %1$sSharuɗɗa da Ka'idoji%2$s da %3$sSanarwan Sirri%4$s."
"Idan ka ci gaba, ka yarda da %1$sSharuɗɗa da Ƙa'idoji%2$s."
Idan ku ci gaba, ku yarda da Sharuɗɗa da ƙaídoji %1$s%2$s da kuma Tsarin Sanarwar Sirri %3$s%4$s.
Idan ku ci gaba, ku yarda da %1$sSharuɗɗa da Ƙaídojin%2$s mu na da kuma %3$sTsarin Sanarwa na Sirri%4$s.
Yi amfani da keɓaɓɓen bayanai na don samar da tallace-tallace da labarai game da wasanni (na zaɓi)
Samu labarai da garaɓs ta musamman
Domin ci gaba, amince da waɗannan:
Ba za a iya buɗe %s ba. Goge wasu fayiloli ko cire manhajojin da ba a amfani da su, sannan a sake gwadawa.
"Na yarda da sarrafa bayanai da raba bayanan nau'ina na musamman."
Na yarda na canja wurin ketare iyaka.
Na amince da samun labarai da tayuka na musamman. (na zaɓi)
Ba za ku sami lada don kallon wannan tallan ba.
Duba haɗin netwok ɗinka sannan kuma sake gwadawa.
